title: Generate TGT
html:
Generate TGT

netexec smb ip -u user -p password --generate-tgt /path

export KRB5CCNAME=/path

netexec smb ip -u user -k --use-kcache
excerpt: Generate TGT netexec smb ip -u user -p password --generate-tgt /path export KRB5CCNAME=/path netexec smb ip -u user -k --use-kcache
